sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed. The white diamond seems to have moved to the bottom now, near the goal. Let me inspect the state.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']

print("Key objects:")
for n in nodes:
    c = n['color']
    if c in ['W', 'M', 'G'] or (c == 'p' and n['pixels'] >= 15):
        center_r = sum(p[0] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        center_c = sum(p[1] for p in n['boundary']) // len(n['boundary'])
        print(f"  color={c} px={n['pixels']} center=({center_r},{center_c}) boundary={n['boundary']}")

# Check what changed
before = last_transition.before_frame.segmentation['nodes']
after = last_transition.after_frame.segmentation['nodes']
print("\nBefore G:", [n for n in before if n['color'] == 'G'])
print("After G:", [n for n in after if n['color'] == 'G'])
print("Before W:", [n for n in before if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 10])
print("After W:", [n for n in after if n['color'] == 'W' and n['pixels'] > 10])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>

sections.label: THINKING
sections.content:
Now I see:
- The goal G changed from (59,27) to (53,28) - it moved to where the white diamond was
- A new W (white) object appeared at (59,27) where the goal was - 8 pixels
- The purple square is still at (55,27) with magenta at (56,27)
So clicking the goal swapped its color with the white trail/diamond. The goal is now at (53,28) and the white diamond is at (59,27).
This is the same mechanic as before - clicking the goal swaps colors. The goal moved further away from the purple square/magenta.
Now I need to get the magenta to the new goal position at (53,28). The purple square is at (55,27). Let me click the purple square to advance.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
# Goal moved to (53,28), purple square at (55,27), white at (59,27)
# Click purple square to advance toward new goal
action([{'action': 'MOUSE', 'row': 55, 'col': 27}])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
